title: Ulaguthula Song Lyrics Kovai Brothers
stanzas:
Ulaguthula Song Lyrics Kovai Brothers
@immancomposer

Ulaguthula, nee enga
venaalum yaen
porandhirukka koodaathaa
porandhirukka koodaathaa
yaen India vula porandha

India vula nee enga
venaalum yaen
valarndhirukka koodaadhaa
valarndhirukka koodaadhaa

yaen mumbai nagarula
valarntha

Mumani nagaril nee
nirandharamaaga
irundhirukka koodaathaa

yaen chennai pattanam
vandha.

Chennai pattanam vandhaalum
enga areavula adhir
veettula yaen vandha ?

unna paarthom
udanji thoolaanom
unna paarthom
norungi noolaanom

hey pallu velakka
kayyil brush eduthaa
andha tooth brush kooda
thoorigai aachu.

un pala pala meniyil hah
thottu thavulum podhu hah
ada saadhaa soappum
sandhanam aachu

nee seevum podhu
seeppukku kooda
singappallu mulachaachu

nee vaangum podhum
aavin paalum adadaa
agmark neiyaachu

nee service poatta
tennis baalum
typhoid vandhu
stretcher aeri paduthaachu

unna paarthom
udanji thoolaanom
unna paarthom
norungi noolaanom

nee saivam endru haah
poi solla venaam hah
un kangal kulla
meengal ulladhadi

panakkaari endru hah
oru garvam venaam hah
un iduppa paarthaa
varuma theirudhadi.

nee nadakkum podhu
currenta eduthu
Neivelikku anupudilaam

nee sanju paarthaa
sarinju kedakkum
paisa kopuram nimindhidalaam

un sirippil sindhum
sillarai serthaa
india naattin motha
kadanaiyum theerthidalaam

unna paarthom
udanji thoolaanom
unna paarthom
norungi noolaanom

Ulaguthula, nee enga
venaalum yaen
porandhirukka koodaathaa
porandhirukka koodaathaa
yaen India vula porandha

India vula nee enga
venaalum yaen
valarndhirukka koodaadhaa
valarndhirukka koodaadhaa

yaen mumbai nagarula
valarntha

Mumani nagaril nee
nirandharamaaga
irundhirukka koodaathaa

yaen chennai pattanam
vandha.

Chennai pattanam vandhaalum
enga areavula adhir
veettula yaen vandha ?

udanji thoolaanom
unna paarthom
norungi noolaanom

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Ulaguthula'?

The song 'Ulaguthula' conveys a sense of energy and celebration, reflecting the vibrant spirit of life.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Kovai Brothers'?

In Kovai Brothers, the song is featured during a lively sequence that emphasizes fun and camaraderie among the characters.

Who is the singer and music director of 'Ulaguthula'?

The song is sung and composed by D Imman, known for his energetic and catchy compositions.

When was 'Ulaguthula' released?

'Ulaguthula' was released on February 24, 2006.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Ulaguthula' from the movie Kovai Brothers is a vibrant and energetic track that captures the essence of celebration and joy. It features lively beats and catchy lyrics that evoke a sense of excitement and camaraderie among friends. The song's upbeat nature makes it perfect for parties and celebrations, encouraging listeners to let loose and enjoy the moment. Overall, it reflects the fun-loving spirit of the characters in the film.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ulaguthula from the movie Kovai Brothers is an electrifying track that showcases D Imman's vibrant musical style. With its catchy beats and lively lyrics, this song is sure to get you moving and grooving. Experience the unique blend of energy and rhythm that makes this song a must-listen for any Tamil music lover!
stanzaMeanings: In this world, why were you born anywhere else but here?
In India, why did you grow up anywhere else?
Why did you grow up in Mumbai city?
In Mumbai city, why were you always there?
Why did you come to Chennai city?
Even if you came to Chennai, why did you come to our area?
When we see you, we feel like we are losing our minds; when we see you, we feel like we are getting tangled up.
Hey, when you take a brush in your hand, even that toothbrush has become useless.
When you touch many things, it feels like soap has become a problem.
When you are alive, even the fish in your eyes are alive.
Don't say you are a proud person; when I see your waist, it looks like a problem.
When you walk, we can send electricity to Neivel.
When you look at Sanju, you can earn money easily.
Your smile can solve all the debts of India.
When we see you, we feel like we are losing our minds; when we see you, we feel like we are getting tangled up.
In this world, why were you born anywhere else but here?
In India, why did you grow up anywhere else?
Why did you grow up in Mumbai city?
In Mumbai city, why were you always there?
Why did you come to Chennai city?
Even if you came to Chennai, why did you come to our area?
When we see you, we feel like we are losing our minds; when we see you, we feel like we are getting tangled up.
